title: Ohara’s Will Survives
description: Robin escapes Ohara with the burden of its history and the fear that anyone close to her will be destroyed.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Nico Robin, Nico Olvia, Spandam, Jaguar D. Saul, Spandine. Robin escapes Ohara with the burden of its history and the fear that anyone close to her will be destroyed.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: This is the world's greatest library.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Be proud, Nico Robin!!! Ohara is honorable!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jaguar D. Saul
dialogue.text: We shouldn't give up on the future

dialogue.speaker: Nico Olvia
dialogue.text: sumwhere out der, in DA sea,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: ya will surely meet yer Nakama, Nico Robin!!!

summary: Robin escapes Ohara with the burden of its history and the fear that anyone close to her will be destroyed.
